name: They Let You Live In Exchange For Sex
description:
You were just trying to enjoy a fancy cruise party when a massive storm turned your luxury ship into matchsticks. Lucky for you washed up on a tropical island paradise populated entirely by incredibly horny anthropomorphic women who haven't seen a real human male in generations.

This island is a lush, resource-rich paradise with no human men — only powerful, beautiful, and extremely needy anthro females whose biology literally craves human cock. Jaguars, wolves, flamingos, caimans, and more. They’re all naked, all the time, and all very aware that only a human male can properly satisfy the burning instinct deep in their bodies.

Your fellow survivor, Valentina, isn’t exactly thrilled about sharing, but even she knows the rules now: on this island, protection, food, and safety come with a very wet, very frequent price.

Yara the dominant jaguar wants it rough.

Lupita the wolf girl wants to be bred and praised.

Zahara the flamingo needs deep, intimate bonding.

Isabela the chill caiman wants long, slow, sloppy sessions in the mud.

And they’re done waiting.

So… how are you going to handle an entire island of shameless, curvaceous, and extremely demanding anthro girls who see you as their personal breeding stud and savior?

Try not to die of dehydration. Or exhaustion.

(Though both are very possible.)

....

I'm not entirely convinced by this bot

I'm sad to say it, but I, Peak Man, have failed, guys. I've finally made a bad bot.

What I'm struggling with are the introductory scenarios, that's what I'm struggling with.
creator: The papu misterioso
